title: Multi-Tenant Order Management API
description: Backend API for managing users, products, orders, and Stripe payment links with tenant isolation and role-based access control.
impact: Designed a secure multi-tenant backend with payments, RBAC, and isolated business data.

image.alt: Diagram showing multi-tenant API architecture and request flow

title: LLVM Optimisations for Energy-Efficient Code
description: Research project evaluating how LLVM compiler optimisations affect runtime, average power draw, and estimated energy consumption on real low-power hardware.
impact: Built a Raspberry Pi 5 framework to measure LLVM/Clang optimisation effects using PolyBench, Python, and PMIC power readings.

image.alt: Portfolio image showing LLVM optimisation pipeline for energy-efficient code on Raspberry Pi 5
